input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.2.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.2.2.2
            TITLE: any portion of the air intake system that is less than 350 mm above the ground must be

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.2.2.2: Any portion of the air intake system that is less than 350 mm above the ground must be
IC.2.2.2 Any portion of the air intake system that is less than 350 mm above the ground must be 
shielded from side or rear impacts by structure built per F.6.4 / F.7.5 as applicable.

final_answer: Any portion of the air intake system that is less than 350 mm above the ground must be shielded from side or rear impacts by structure built per F.6.4 / F.7.5 as applicable.
